title: BYND update: AI is still holding a buy signal.
author: ExplanationNormal339
selftext:
Fresh analysis just came through on BYND — the AI is maintaining a Buy signal with 87% confidence and an 88% historical accuracy rate.

Price is sitting around 2.84 after a steep pullback, but momentum and volume are telling a different story. We’re still seeing strong short-term setups forming with entry around 2.84, take-profit near 3.20, and stop at 2.50.

Volume remains unusually high, RSI is steady at 56, and MACD is near a potential crossover. Institutions have been quietly accumulating, and retail sentiment across Reddit has flipped bullish again.

The trendline break from last week hasn’t invalidated yet, and options flow continues to support a possible recovery toward the 3.20–3.50 range if the price holds above support.

AI confidence is high, but volatility is too — small position sizing remains key.
See the full live signal here: https://aimytrade.io/ticker/BYND
